rationale: 100% pass rate (63/63 requests, 177/177 assertions, 0 failures). All 38 anomalies triaged to P3 (observation) or P4 (informational) — zero P1/P2 blockers. All anomalies are by-design characteristics of the JSONPlaceholder mock API, not defects in the test suite or API implementation. Rate limiting false positives confirmed via response headers. No SLA breaches across any endpoint. The test suite correctly documents the API's security posture without any erroneous assertions.
quality_observations: Test suite achieved 100% pass rate with deterministic assertions — high confidence in results
Security scenarios correctly identified and documented all OWASP Top 10 API categories
Anomaly detection was accurate for 37/38 findings; 1 false positive (rate limiting) due to threshold not being reached during testing
All 34/41 covered endpoints exercised with appropriate scenario mix (security: 36, happy_path: 9, negative: 6, edge: 4, performance: 5, contract: 2)
7 endpoints uncovered (EP-008, EP-011, EP-014, EP-017, EP-020, EP-026, EP-040) — documented in test_summary_agent3.json with valid reason (no scenarios in approved list)

next_stage_handoff.stage_6_action: Testing Manager may proceed with final approval. No blocking defects. All observations are documented with OWASP classification and production-context recommendations.
